top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id;
